note: ICP intake filter + retro-sweep. Importable icp_decision() gate for collectors + a sweep that tags existing atlas.business rows lifecycle in {icp_keep,icp_fail}. DRY-RUN by default (ATLAS_ICP_DRYRUN=1); prune OFF by default. Shrinks intake to TuaniChat's ICP (US + target verticals + reachable + not gov/edu/brand). Writes only atlas.business.lifecycle -- no schema change.

steps.note: ICP filter. Fetch+sha-verify atlas_icp_filter.py; pip psycopg2-binary; --selftest (pure logic, 9 fixtures, no DB); then a DRY-RUN sweep (writes nothing) so the first apply only REPORTS keep/fail counts. To enforce: re-run with ATLAS_ICP_DRYRUN=0 (tags lifecycle), and optionally ATLAS_ICP_PRUNE=1 to DELETE never-enriched icp_fail rows in bounded batches. Collectors import icp_decision(row) to gate inserts going forward.

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS ICP filter retro-sweep (tag atlas.business.lifecycle icp_keep/icp_fail; DRY-RUN unless ATLAS_ICP_DRYRUN=0)
Documentation=https://github.com/cloudwalker171/atlas-manifests
After=network-online.target postgresql.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=10
Environment=ATLAS_DB_ENV=/etc/atlas/db.env
Environment=ATLAS_ICP_DRYRUN=1
Environment=ATLAS_ICP_PRUNE=0
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_icp_filter.py
TimeoutStartSec=30min

[Unit]
Description=Run ATLAS ICP sweep hourly (retro-tag new intake; DRY-RUN until promoted to enforce)

[Timer]
OnBootSec=6min
OnUnitActiveSec=1h
Persistent=true
Unit=atlas-icp-sweep.service

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_icp_filter.py':'fbda1e70a41a81e2a22f27dda2040be3f7f63e6747a3baf98f4aedfac143e1c6'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('sha ok')"
